fields.label: Job Card
fields.description: Select the submitted Job Card you are recording production against. Only submitted Job Cards are shown. Order Qty, Produced Qty, and Balance Qty will auto-populate.

fields.label: Order Qty
fields.description: Total quantity ordered on this Job Card. Fetched automatically from the Job Card.

fields.label: Produced Qty
fields.description: Total good quantity already produced and submitted for this Job Card (before this entry).

fields.label: Balance Qty
fields.description: Remaining quantity before this entry. Calculated as: Order Qty − Produced Qty. This is the 'balance before' value.

fields.label: Good Qty
fields.description: Number of good/usable units produced in this run. This is the quantity that counts towards fulfilling the order.

fields.label: Waste Qty
fields.description: Number of rejected/wasted units — misprints, damaged sheets, setup waste, etc. Tracked for quality analysis but does not reduce the balance.

fields.label: Running Balance
fields.description: Balance after this entry. Calculated as: Balance Qty − Good Qty. Shows what remains to be produced after this row's output is counted.

fields.label: Stage
fields.description: The manufacturing stage this production was done at: Printing, Slitting, Rewinding, or Packing.

fields.label: Machine
fields.description: Machine used for this production run, e.g. Flexo 1, Slitter A.

fields.label: Operator
fields.description: Name of the operator who ran this production.

fields.label: Shift
fields.description: Shift during which this production was done, e.g. Day, Night, Morning.

fields.label: Start Time
fields.description: Actual time production started for this run.

fields.label: End Time
fields.description: Actual time production ended for this run.

fields.label: Downtime (mins)
fields.description: Actual machine downtime in minutes during this run (breakdowns, setup, changeovers).

fields.label: Remarks
fields.description: Any notes about this production run — issues faced, material used, quality observations, etc.
